data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked the tour, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants needed to confirm the booking. This directly contradicts the expected outcome of the scenario, which states that the behavior should either confirm support or produce a clear failure report. The linked use case explicitly states that a minimum of 4 people is required to run the tour, thus creating a gap in the validation of the scenario.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked the tour, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
